summary: Practice admin now supports non-media practice_tacit_items authoring through the existing query/admin boundaries, with targeted summary updates and unchanged menu/session/admin read helpers automatically surfacing the new text tacit data according to existing linkage/current-next rules. Reported Phase 4 completed in the required order with build pass, lint pass except the documented pre-existing useGameTick warning, self-reviewer approved 8/8, tsc pass, task-related LAST_SESSION update, and additional read-helper vitest 120/120 pass.
